ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* Unique internal identifier for the transaction */,
  "transactionHash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "blockNumber" INTEGER /* Block number where the transaction was confirmed */,
  "timeSend" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was sent */,
  "timeReceipt" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was received */,
  "timeConfirmed" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was confirmed */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blockchain network */,
  "transactionFee" REAL /* Transaction fee paid in the network's native currency */,
  "gasUsed" INTEGER /* Gas used by the transaction */,
  "senderAddress" TEXT /* Sender's address */,
  "receiverAddress" TEXT /* Receiver's address */,
  "transactionValue" REAL /* Value transferred in the transaction */,
  "transactionType" TEXT /* Type of the transaction (e.g., token transfer, smart contract execution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internalTxID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES blockchain_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the blockchain network (e.g., Ethereum, Bitcoin) */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of the blockchain network (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "native_currency" TEXT /* Native currency of the blockchain (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Average time to mine a block */,
  "explorer_url" TEXT /* URL to the block explorer for the network */,
  "rpc_endpoint" TEXT /* RPC endpoint for the network */,
  "ws_endpoint" TEXT /* Websocket endpoint for the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, auditor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the event is related to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., sent, received, confirmed) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event (e.g., error message, status) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_events_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the fee is associated with */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of the fee (e.g., network fee, gas fee) */,
  "fee_payer" TEXT /* Address that paid the fee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_gas" (
  "gas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas usage record */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the gas usage is associated with */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Amount of gas used */,
  "gas_price" REAL /* Price of gas in the network's native currency */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit set for the transaction */,
  "gas_cost" REAL /* Total gas cost for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_gas_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the error is related to */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error (e.g., insufficient funds, invalid recipient) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error */,
  "error_status" TEXT /* Status of the error (e.g., resolved, unresolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_errors_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the status is related to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, confirmed, failed) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "status_details" TEXT /* Details of the status update (e.g., reason for failure) */,
  "status_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_status_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("status_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_status_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the label is associated with */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color assigned to the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_labels_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the note is associated with */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_notes_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_notes_note_author FOREIGN KEY ("note_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_tags_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "internalTxID" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction the alert is associated with */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_alerts_internalTxID FOREIGN KEY ("internalTxID") REFERENCES transactions ("internalTxID")
)
